title: hieracium atratum subsp. pseudobipes
intro: Hieracium atratum subsp. pseudobipes is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, commonly known as hawkweed, and is a type of flowering plant. It is used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hieracium atratum subsp. pseudobipes often include infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or taken as supplements.
